items.title_en: US inflation jumps to 3.8% as energy costs surge from Iran war
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争导致能源成本飙升，美国通胀率跃升至3.8%
items.desc_en: The key measure of US inflation rises its highest level since May 2023 as consumers feel the impact of the Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 随着消费者感受到伊朗战争的影响，衡量美国通胀的关键指标升至 2023 年 5 月以来的最高水平。

items.title_en: RBC sees stocks pushing higher as everyone has 'jumped in the pool'
items.title_zh: 加拿大皇家银行认为股市上涨，因为每个人都“跳入池中”
items.desc_en: It's not just retail traders who have become super bullish on stocks, according to RBC Capital Markets' Amy Wu-Silverman.
items.desc_zh: 加拿大皇家银行资本市场 (RBC Capital Markets) 的艾米·吴-西尔弗曼 (Amy Wu-Silverman) 表示，不仅仅是散户交易员对股票变得超级看好。

items.title_en: Analysis: Iran war hangs over Trump's China trip — and his presidency
items.title_zh: 分析：伊朗战争笼罩着特朗普的中国之行及其总统任期
items.desc_en: There is no quick fix to the economic and political damage from the war.
items.desc_zh: 战争造成的经济和政治损失没有快速解决办法。

items.title_en: Inflation jumps to its highest level since 2023. Here are 3 things costing a lot more - NPR
items.title_zh: 通货膨胀跃升至 2023 年以来的最高水平。以下 3 件事成本更高 - NPR
items.desc_en: Inflation jumps to its highest level since 2023. Here are 3 things costing a lot more  NPRCPI Shows Inflation Accelerating After Weeks of War in Iran  The New York TimesUS consumer prices increase fur
items.desc_zh: 通货膨胀跃升至 2023 年以来的最高水平。以下三件事花费更多 NPRCPI 显示伊朗战争数周后通货膨胀加速纽约时报美国消费者价格大幅上涨

items.title_en: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls of the day: Nvidia, Broadcom, Tesla, Lowe's, Disney, Intel & more
items.title_zh: 以下是周二当天最大的分析师电话会议：Nvidia、Broadcom、Tesla、Lowe's、Disney、Intel 等
items.desc_en: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Tuesday.
items.desc_zh: 以下是周二华尔街最大的呼吁。

items.title_en: Consumer prices rose 3.8% annually in April, the highest since May 2023
items.title_zh: 4月份消费者价格同比上涨3.8%，创2023年5月以来最高
items.desc_en: The consumer price index was expected to increase by 3.7% annually in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.
items.desc_zh: 根据道琼斯共识，预计 4 月份消费者价格指数将同比增长 3.7%。

items.title_en: Buy this drone stock as demand for unmanned aircrafts grows, Goldman Sachs says
items.title_zh: 高盛表示，随着无人机需求的增长，购买无人机股票
items.desc_en: The bank initiated coverage of the drone name with a buy rating.
items.desc_zh: 该银行首次对无人机名称进行了买入评级。

items.title_en: AI super rally has retail investors acting the most aggressive since trading frenzy during Covid
items.title_zh: 人工智能超级反弹让散户投资者表现出自新冠疫情期间交易狂潮以来最激进的表现
items.desc_en: Retail traders are buying calls in Cboe's "Mag 10" stocks – the big seven plus AMD, Palantir and Broadcom – at the heaviest 10-day clip since 2021, according to a report from the exchange.
items.desc_zh: 根据芝加哥期权交易所的一份报告，散户交易员正在买入芝加哥期权交易所“Mag 10”股票（七大股票加上 AMD、Palantir 和 Broadcom）的看涨期权，这是自 2021 年以来最猛烈的 10 天涨幅。

items.title_en: Bulls and bears both believe this could be 1999 all over again. Embrace it or dump your tech stocks?
items.title_zh: 多头和空头都认为 1999 年可能会重演。拥抱它还是抛售你的科技股？
items.desc_en: We are not guaranteed a close rerun of the 1999-2000 extremes. Just because things got crazier then doesn't mean that's ahead of us.
items.desc_zh: 我们不能保证 1999 年至 2000 年的极端情况会重演。仅仅因为当时事情变得更加疯狂并不意味着我们就这样了。

items.title_en: Trump is taking more than a dozen U.S. executives to China. Jensen Huang isn't one of them
items.title_zh: 特朗普将带十几名美国高管前往中国。黄仁勋不是其中之一
items.desc_en: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang isn't going on Trump’s China trip, though more than a dozen other U.S. executives are.
items.desc_zh: 英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋不会参加特朗普的中国之行，但其他十几位美国高管却参加了。

items.title_en: Uganda's president sworn in for record seventh term
items.title_zh: 乌干达总统宣誓就职，创历史第七个任期
items.desc_en: Yoweri Museveni, 81, won disputed elections in January to extend his 40-year rule.
items.desc_zh: 81 岁的约韦里·穆塞韦尼 (Yoweri Museveni) 在 1 月份赢得了有争议的选举，延长了他 40 年的统治。

items.title_en: EBay rejects GameStop's $56 billion takeover bid, calling it 'neither credible nor attractive'
items.title_zh: eBay 拒绝 GameStop 560 亿美元的收购要约，称其“既不可信也不有吸引力”
items.desc_en: Many analysts questioned the deal, citing questions about how GameStop would finance the transaction and the strategic rationale.
items.desc_zh: 许多分析师对这笔交易提出质疑，理由是 GameStop 将如何为交易提供资金以及战略理由。

items.title_en: Hims & Hers plummets 16% after first-quarter loss, weak earnings guidance
items.title_zh: Hims & Hers 第一季度亏损、盈利指引疲软，股价暴跌 16%
items.desc_en: Hims & Hers reached a deal with Novo Nordisk in March to sell its GLP-1 weight loss drug Wegovy on its platform.
items.desc_zh: Hims & Hers 今年 3 月与诺和诺德 (Novo Nordisk) 达成协议，在其平台上销售其 GLP-1 减肥药物 Wegovy。

items.title_en: EU needs to delay social media access for children - von der Leyen
items.title_zh: 冯德莱恩：欧盟需要推迟儿童使用社交媒体的时间
items.desc_en: She told an EU summit that an expert panel was due to come up with steps on how to protect minors online by July.
items.desc_zh: 她在一次欧盟峰会上表示，专家小组将于 7 月份就如何保护未成年人上网制定措施。

items.title_en: Canvas hack: company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data
items.title_zh: Canvas 黑客：公司付钱给犯罪分子，让他们删除学生被盗的数据
items.desc_en: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.
items.desc_zh: Canvas 背后的公司表示，它已经与扰乱数千所学院和大学的黑客“达成协议”。

items.title_en: Texas accuses Netflix of spying on users, including children
items.title_zh: 德克萨斯州指控 Netflix 监视用户，包括儿童
items.desc_en: The lawsuit comes amid increased scrutiny over platform features like auto-play that deliver endless content to users.
items.desc_zh: 此次诉讼发生之际，人们对自动播放等向用户提供无尽内容的平台功能进行了越来越严格的审查。

items.desc_zh: 在让顾客迷上两天和次日送达后，亚马逊逐渐加快了送货时间。

items.title_zh: 联合国卫生机构称，没有迹象表明存在更大规模的汉坦病毒爆发

items.desc_zh: 世界卫生组织负责人警告说，情况仍可能发生变化，可能会出现更多确诊病例。

items.title_en: On Holding beats first-quarter expectations, sees double-digit growth in China as Nike lags
items.title_zh: On Holding 超出第一季度预期，预计中国市场将实现两位数增长，而耐克落后
items.desc_en: Swiss sneaker company On beat Wall Street's expectations on the top and bottom lines, helped in part by strong sales in China.
items.desc_zh: 瑞士运动鞋公司 On 的营收和利润超出了华尔街的预期，这在一定程度上得益于其在中国的强劲销售。

items.title_en: Crypto legislation faces another hurdle: Labor unions
items.title_zh: 加密立法面临另一个障碍：工会
items.desc_en: Major labor groups ask senators in a letter obtained first by CNBC to oppose a crypto bill over concerns retirement accounts could be harmed.
items.desc_zh: CNBC 最先获得的一封信中，主要劳工组织要求参议员反对加密货币法案，因为担心退休账户可能会受到损害。

items.desc_zh: 这是自 20 世纪 70 年代召开这些会议以来的第一次，此举反映了法国思维的变化。

items.title_zh: 美国就在格陵兰岛开设新基地进行严格谈判

items.desc_zh: 该平台表示将删除端到端加密消息，这是母公司 Meta 的一个重大转变。

items.desc_zh: 这场不和加剧了两家科技巨头之间代价高昂的摊牌。

items.title_en: Former OpenAI board member says Elon Musk offered her sperm donations

items.desc_zh: Shivon Zilis 是马斯克四个孩子的母亲。这种关系始于她为 OpenAI 提供建议时。

items.title_en: Robot wars - what an operation in Ukraine tells us about the battlefield of the near future

items.desc_zh: 在乌克兰总统泽伦斯基表示仅使用机器人和无人机就占领了领土之后，无人战争的未来是什么？
